level.setting: An ominous, decaying Obsidian Spire suspended over an active magma sea.

pickup.name: Magma Core Shard
pickup.effect: Provides temporary fire resistance

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Stalker collapses the bridge, opening the path to the Boiling Vents.

pickup.name: Crystallized Ember
pickup.effect: Increases tectonic strike damage

encounters.trigger: Breaking the Golem triggers a seismic shift that lowers the barrier to the Furnace Chamber.

pickup.name: Volcanic Seal
pickup.effect: Nullifies the boss's elemental shield

encounters.trigger: The Wraith’s death forces the central pressure seal to explode, revealing the Core Warden.

boss.name: Ignis, the Core Warden
boss.victory_condition: Use the Volcanic Seal to drain the Warden's shield, then strike with the Earth-shattering Staff.

level.objective: Reach the peak of the Obsidian Spire and stabilize the volcanic core.
level.reward: The Heart of the Mountain, granting the geomancer infinite mana.

level.setting: The Infernal Caldera, a chaotic region of shifting tectonic plates and constant volcanic activity.

encounters.hazard: Periodic lava geysers erupting from the bridge floor.

pickup.name: Obsidian Shard
pickup.effect: Increases fire damage absorption.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the wraith stabilizes the bridge path towards the sulfur pits.

encounters.hazard: Toxic sulfur gas clouds reducing visibility.

pickup.name: Cooled Magma Core
pickup.effect: Enhances fire projectile penetration.

encounters.trigger: Slaying the beast triggers a seismic shift, revealing the entrance to the Ancient Forge.

encounters.hazard: Falling debris from the deteriorating forge ceiling.

pickup.name: Master Key
pickup.effect: Grants access to the caldera control console.

encounters.trigger: Destroying the construct unlocks the heavy obsidian doors to the inner vault.

boss.name: Ignis Prime
boss.victory_condition: Use the Master Key to initiate the emergency shutdown of the caldera core.

level.objective: Stabilize the collapsing magma core before the volcano erupts.

pickup.name: Frost Amulet
pickup.effect: Temporarily chills enemies, slowing their attack speed.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the stalker releases cooling steam that creates a path to the inner vault.

pickup.name: Titan's Whetstone
pickup.effect: Sharpens the Sacred Mace, doubling damage for the next few swings.

encounters.trigger: The construct's destruction activates a pressure plate that opens the gate to the core entrance.

pickup.name: Core Essence
pickup.effect: Absorbs ambient heat and grants resistance to fire damage.

encounters.trigger: The knight drops the key needed to unlock the final boss chamber door.

boss.name: Pyre Sovereign
boss.victory_condition: Use the Core Essence to neutralize the Sovereign's fire shield before striking the final blow.

level.objective: Purge the Molten Sanctum of the Pyre Sovereign.

level.setting: A desolate, crumbling volcanic landscape filled with toxic gas and active eruptions.

encounters.hazard: Lava jets erupting from floor vents.

pickup.name: Frost Core
pickup.effect: Temporarily solidifies molten ground underfoot.

encounters.trigger: Slaying the Crawler cools the molten bridge to reach the Grotto entrance.

pickup.name: Thermal Dampener
pickup.effect: Negates extreme heat damage for 30 seconds.

encounters.trigger: Victory forces the Grotto air vents open to clear the way to the Sulfur Pit.

pickup.name: Sovereign Seal
pickup.effect: Disables the invulnerability shield of the final boss.

encounters.trigger: Removing the Sentinel unlocks the path to the Caldera.

boss.name: Obsidian Heart
boss.victory_condition: Use the Sovereign Seal to break the shield then strike the core with the Greataxe.

level.objective: Extinguish the Eternal Ember at the heart of the volcano.

pickup.name: Pressurized Steam Canister
pickup.effect: Deals massive bonus damage against heat-resistant foes

encounters.trigger: Defeating the golem triggers the opening of a pressurized steam valve

pickup.name: Conductive Copper Coil
pickup.effect: Amplifies electrical damage against armor

encounters.trigger: The wraith's dissipation activates a retractable bridge to the sanctum

pickup.name: Obsidian Tuning Fork
pickup.effect: Shatters volcanic glass armors

encounters.trigger: The sentinel's defeat grants access to the inner boss chamber

boss.name: Ignis, The Eternal Forge-Lord
boss.victory_condition: Destroy his glass armor and extinguish the central forge

level.objective: Retrieve the Heart of the Caldera to silence the volcanic eruptions

pickup.name: Frost Shard
pickup.effect: Solidifies flowing magma into climbable stone.

encounters.trigger: Touching the cooling vent activates the path to the inner sanctum.

pickup.name: Void Catalyst
pickup.effect: Enhances electrical conductivity of the stormcaller aura.

encounters.trigger: Shattering the sentinel releases the seal to the core chamber.

pickup.name: Heart of the Ember
pickup.effect: Douses fire-based immunity on the boss.

encounters.trigger: Absorbing the wraith energy clears the barricade to the Furnace Heart.

boss.name: Ignis, the Burning Sovereign
boss.victory_condition: Use the Heart of the Ember to extinguish his spirit.

level.setting: An active but cartoonish volcano filled with dancing fire spirits.

pickup.name: Frost-Pop
pickup.effect: Creates an icy shield that lasts for one turn.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the bunny releases a stream of Frost-Pop gas towards the Obsidian Ridge.

pickup.name: Glow-Berry
pickup.effect: Stuns enemies with blinding light.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the slime solidifies a magma bridge leading to the Caldera Gate.

pickup.name: Molten Core Key
pickup.effect: Used to unlock the Boss Chamber and expose the boss's internal flame.

encounters.trigger: The defeated turtle tips over to reveal a hidden lock that opens the path to the Boss Chamber.

boss.name: Grand Magma Goose
boss.victory_condition: Use the Molten Core Key to freeze the magma goose into a solid statue.

level.objective: Traverse the volcanic lands and soothe the Grand Magma Goose.

level.setting: The volcanic crater of Mount Chronos

pickup.name: Chrono-Oil
pickup.effect: Slows surrounding thermal kinetic energy

encounters.trigger: Defeating the construct activates a thermal relay that clears the obsidian path to the Boiling Pools.

pickup.name: Ancient Cooling Rod
pickup.effect: Solidifies molten rock into stable walkways

encounters.trigger: The dissipating sprite stabilizes the gravity field, unlocking access to the Obsidian Throne.

pickup.name: Temporal Essence
pickup.effect: Restores 50 health and disrupts chronal anchors

encounters.trigger: The guardian collapses into a portal key, opening the gateway to the Core Chamber for the final boss.

boss.name: Ignis, the Time-Eater
boss.victory_condition: Force the boss into a localized time loop to stabilize the rift.

level.objective: Stabilize the temporal rift within the volcanic core.
level.reward: The Chrono-Heart, an artifact of infinite time flow.

level.setting: A floating island archipelago suspended within an endless cosmic nebula

encounters.hazard: Shifting light patterns causing periodic blinding effects

pickup.name: Star-Shard Core
pickup.effect: Enhances holy aura damage against ethereal entities

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Sentinel creates a bridge of solid light to the Cloud Terrace

encounters.hazard: Piercing starlight beams dealing low damage over time

pickup.name: Celestial Essence Phial
pickup.effect: Grants brief invulnerability to shadow-based attacks

encounters.trigger: Calming the spirit clears the dense fog obscuring the Gate of Zenith

encounters.hazard: Void rifts that exert a pulling force toward the edge of the island

pickup.name: Chronos Key
pickup.effect: Allows the user to manipulate local time flow

encounters.trigger: The Warden's defeat collapses the forcefield protecting the inner altar

boss.name: Astraeus, The Star-Forged King
boss.victory_condition: Use the Chronos Key to freeze his movement during his charge and strike his exposed core

level.objective: Ascend to the Zenith Altar and restore the primordial light

level.setting: A decaying temple drifting through the center of a dying nebula.

encounters.hazard: Temporal flux spikes that age the player rapidly.

pickup.name: Stardust Compass
pickup.effect: Reveals hidden temporal anomalies and navigation paths.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the wraith reveals a shimmering path to the Moonlit Observatory.

encounters.hazard: Gravity inversion zones that disrupt movement.

pickup.name: Chrono-Crystal
pickup.effect: Allows the user to strike through hardened defensive armor.

encounters.trigger: Activating the compass grants passage to the Celestial Forge.

encounters.hazard: Burning solar winds that drain health over time.

pickup.name: Eternity Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the gateway to the Boss Arena and destabilizes immortal defenses.

encounters.trigger: Shattering the golem releases the Eternity Key needed for the final gate.

boss.name: Celestial Warden
boss.victory_condition: Use the Eternity Key to bind the Warden and stop the time collapse.

level.objective: Restore the shattered timeline by defeating the Celestial Warden.

level.setting: The decaying celestial expanse between dying stars.

pickup.name: Solar Core
pickup.effect: Increases blade precision against light-based entities

encounters.trigger: Defeating the sentinel causes the bridge to collapse, revealing the entrance to the Cosmic Shrine.

pickup.name: Starlight Shard
pickup.effect: Empowers blades with celestial energy

encounters.trigger: The wraith's death releases light that illuminates the path to the Celestial Throne.

pickup.name: Gravity Anchor
pickup.effect: Allows the player to pin airborne deities to the ground

encounters.trigger: Breaking the warden's seal summons the Eclipse Architect.

boss.name: Eclipse Architect
boss.victory_condition: Anchor the Architect to the void to render it vulnerable to final strikes.

level.objective: Restore the balance by defeating the Eclipse Architect.

level.setting: A whimsical floating garden in the clouds.

pickup.name: Star Essence
pickup.effect: Temporarily grants invisibility

encounters.trigger: Touching the sprite causes a rift to open to the Nebula Path.

pickup.name: Solar Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the inner sanctum

encounters.trigger: Defeating the imp reveals a bridge to the Constellation Forge.

pickup.name: Lunar Shard
pickup.effect: Increases spell range

encounters.trigger: Banishing the guardian opens the vault gate to the boss arena.

boss.name: Eclipse Weaver
boss.victory_condition: Use the Lunar Shard to refract the boss's shadows and restore cosmic balance.

level.objective: Collect the three shards of the moon to restore the night sky.

encounters.hazard: Void winds that push the player off the narrow platforms.

pickup.name: Star-Shard
pickup.effect: Increases movement speed and agility by 20 percent.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the sentinel clears the debris blocking the bridge to the Gravity Well.

encounters.hazard: Fluctuating gravitational beams that invert movement controls.

pickup.name: Radiant Lens
pickup.effect: Concentrates electrical attacks to deal double damage to shielded entities.

encounters.trigger: Slaying the phantom collapses the gravity instability, unlocking the door to the Throne of Chaos.

encounters.hazard: Constant meteor showers that restrict movement zones.

pickup.name: Celestial Key
pickup.effect: Allows the user to bypass the impenetrable void shield of the sovereign boss.

encounters.trigger: Vanquishing the corruptor causes the Star-Heart to pulse, revealing the arena for the Void-Sovereign.

boss.name: Void-Sovereign Xal-Thar
boss.victory_condition: Use the Celestial Key to deactivate his shield before striking the final blow.

level.objective: Stabilize the shattered stellar core before the void consumes the constellation.
level.reward: Essence of the Prime Storm and permanent transcendence status.

level.setting: An abandoned star-system floating in the absolute silence of the outer void.

pickup.name: Stellar Core
pickup.effect: Increases arrow impact force.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the scout reveals a gravity bridge leading to the Shattered Spire.

encounters.hazard: Gravity fluctuations that knock the player off balance.

pickup.name: Essence of Sol
pickup.effect: Charges arrows with intense solar energy.

encounters.trigger: Destroying the sentinel deactivates the energy barrier blocking the Astral Gate.

encounters.hazard: Periodic supernova flares that drain health.

pickup.name: Void-Forged Arrow
pickup.effect: Bypasses mystical resistance.

encounters.trigger: Banishing the phantom triggers the opening of the final rift to the Primordial Core.

boss.name: Nebula Archon
boss.victory_condition: Infuse the Star-Piercer with the Essence of Sol to penetrate the Archon's celestial armor.

level.objective: Traverse the desolated celestial path and defeat the Nebula Archon to restore the starlight.
level.reward: The Celestial Crown of the First Star

level.setting: A crumbling palace floating in a void of dying stars.

pickup.name: Charged Core
pickup.effect: Overclocks electrical weapon output.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the husk releases a stable Charged Core.

pickup.name: Stellar Lens
pickup.effect: Magnifies beam damage and piercing.

encounters.trigger: Destroying the construct stabilizes the path to the inner sanctum.

pickup.name: Singularity Shard
pickup.effect: Disrupts cosmic energy fields.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the sentinel opens the final gate to the Singularity Core.

boss.name: Void Archon
boss.victory_condition: Use the Singularity Shard to shatter the Archon's core shell.

level.objective: Restore the light to the Celestial Spire.

level.setting: The crumbling orbital station Aetheria orbiting a dying star.

pickup.name: Thermal Stabilizer
pickup.effect: Grants heat immunity and boosts repair efficiency.

encounters.trigger: Opening the main airlock triggers the station's security grid, revealing the next zone.

pickup.name: Grav-Amplifier
pickup.effect: Disrupts shielding and increases jump height.

encounters.trigger: Downloading the central data logs triggers the reactor core alarm, attracting the final guardian.

encounters.hazard: Heavy debris rain from the collapsing ceiling.

pickup.name: Resonance Catalyst
pickup.effect: Allows the user to project a harmonic disruption frequency.

encounters.trigger: Overriding the emergency shutdown sequence initiates the final boss sequence.

boss.name: Celestial Arch-Core
boss.victory_condition: Use the resonance frequency to destabilize the Arch-Core's shield.

level.objective: Restore the station's reactor to prevent a celestial supernova.
level.reward: The Stellar Core fragment and orbital clearance.
